qa_report.summary: All critical and high-priority requirements implemented correctly. One minor inconsistency found in LoadingSpinner.tsx (uses primary-600 instead of mauve). Contrast ratio verified at 4.58:1 which passes WCAG AA.

requirements_verified.description: Mobile hamburger menu added to Header.tsx
requirements_verified.notes: Mobile menu correctly implemented with useState (line 22), hamburger button with lg:hidden (line 125), desktop nav hidden on mobile (line 43), drawer with all nav items, wishlist, cart, and auth buttons (lines 145-241). Accessibility attributes properly set.
All broken links (/about, /story, /career, /team, /blog, /faq, /privacy, /terms) replaced with 'Coming Soon' styled spans. Contact and social media links retained as functional links.

Full implementation with useState for email/status (lines 5-7), validateEmail function (lines 9-12), handleSubmit with form validation (lines 14-43), success/error feedback with proper ARIA roles (lines 153-162). Accessibility attributes properly set.
Mauve color changed to #9a6680. Verified contrast ratio of 4.58:1 with white text, which passes WCAG AA (4.5:1 requirement).

Button.tsx primary variant updated to use mauve. Header, ProductCard, and HeroBanner already using mauve. Minor inconsistency: LoadingSpinner.tsx still uses text-primary-600 (#db2777) instead of mauve - this is a cosmetic issue, not a requirement failure.

Product images hidden on mobile (hidden lg:flex, line 45). Section height responsive (min-h-[400px] lg:h-[576px], line 22). CTA button responsive (w-full sm:w-auto lg:w-[324px], line 38). Text sizes and padding have responsive classes.

issues_found.description: LoadingSpinner uses text-primary-600 (#db2777) instead of mauve (#9a6680)
issues_found.expected: Consistent primary color (mauve) across all components
issues_found.recommendation: Consider updating LoadingSpinner to use text-mauve for consistency, though this is not a requirement failure

details.aria-label: Dynamic text based on menu state

details.role: status for success, alert for error

tests_needed: Footer.test.tsx: Newsletter form validation and submission
